CIRCLE OF THE MOON
Druids of the Circle of the Moon are fierce guardians
of the wilds. Their order gathers under the full moon to
share and warnings. They haunt thc deepest

The druids of Eberron hold animistic beliefs completely
unconnected to the Sovereign Host, the Dark Six, or any of
the other religions of the world. They believe that every living
thing every
and natural phenomenon-sun, moon, wind,
fire, and the world itself-has a spiri!. Their spells, then, are
a means to communicate with and command these spirits.
Different
druidic sects, though, hold different philosophies

features.name: Land's Stride
features.description: Moving through nonmagical difficult terrain costs no movement. You can also pass through plants without being slowed by them and without damage from them if you are taking damage.

features.name: Wild Shape
features.description: When you choose this circle at 2nd level, you gain the ability to use Wild Shape on your turn as a bonus action.

features.name: Circle Forms
features.description: Starting at 6th level, you can transform into beasts with challenge rating as high as your druid level divided by 3 (rounded down).
